files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+name: Deploy GitHub Pages
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches:
+      - main
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pages: write
+  id-token: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: pages
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  deploy:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    environment:
+      name: github-pages
+      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Configure Pages
+        uses: actions/configure-pages@v5
+
+      - name: Assemble static site
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p dist/pkg
+          cp frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html dist/index.html
+          cp frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html dist/frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html
+          cp pkg/frankenmermaid.js dist/pkg/
+          cp pkg/frankenmermaid_bg.wasm dist/pkg/
+          cp pkg/frankenmermaid.d.ts dist/pkg/
+          cp pkg/frankenmermaid_bg.wasm.d.ts dist/pkg/
+          cp pkg/package.json dist/pkg/
+          cp frankenmermaid_illustration.webp dist/
+
+      - name: Upload Pages artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
+        with:
+          path: dist
+
+      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
+        id: deployment
+        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

+
